text: - **Layout**: single column; the hero is the *proof itself* — two terminal panes with an `@mention` traveling from Claude Code into Codex (the one orchestrated motion moment, reduced-motion-safe). Everything else stays quiet and precise. [...] Terminal-native design: the `@mention` visibly travels from Claude Code into Codex on load (one deliberate motion moment, reduced-motion-safe), a live `who --live` presence board, the identity pull-quote, the comparison table, and the honest-scope section. Warm amber "live-wire" accent on cool ink; both themes; monospace headlines because the headline *is* a terminal line.
